long_description:
Affected support: On-Site Personnel Coverage / DCOPS Supported Services
Location: SYD04
short_description: Onsite Resource Availability - Team Coverage Unavailable (Morning) - SYD04
close_notes: Site Attended - Technicians From Home Site
current_status_next_steps:
Solo SBT on Planned leave. Reached out to MZR team for resource movement. No resource available to be moved to SYD04.
Local SBT took OT shift. Site remained manned through the shift.
